purpose: Strong project evidence should align well with a backend API internship while still treating SQL as under-sold when it is mostly listed.
resume_text:
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Python, SQL, Docker, Git, FastAPI, PostgreSQL

PROJECTS
MarketLens Career Intelligence
- Built and deployed a Python FastAPI backend with PostgreSQL and Docker.
- Implemented API endpoints and automated testing through GitHub Actions.
- Maintained the codebase with Git and wrote documentation.
job_description:
Responsibilities
Build RESTful APIs in Python and support PostgreSQL data models. Maintain Dockerized services and write automated tests.

Required Qualifications
Experience with Python, SQL, Git, and REST APIs.

Preferred Qualifications
AWS and Kubernetes exposure.

purpose: A CS student and IT-support resume should be graded harshly against a mid-level full-stack .NET role and should not headline Agile as the biggest gap.
resume_text:
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science expected May 2027
Major: Computer Science, Cumulative GPA: 3.915

Highlighted coursework: Java, Python, C, Physics of Digital Circuits, Discrete Mathematics, Calculus I & II, Data Structures & Algorithms, Graphics, Database Systems covering SQL, Operating Systems I, Physics I, Intro to Probability.

SKILLS
Computer Languages: Java, Python, C, SQL
Certificates: Building AI Products: Prototyping Essentials Professional Certificate.

RELEVANT EXPERIENCE
IT Department, May-August 2025.
Receiving and responding to company-technology related problems, software and hardware.
Repairing, upgrading, dismantling, and imaging company desktops and chromebooks.
Installing office equipment and repairing company equipment around the office building.
job_description:
What You'll Do:
Perform full-stack development including front end, business logic, and data access layers.
Responsible for the entire development lifecycle from planning to release and support.
Actively contribute to software architecture decisions, design strategies, and code reviews to ensure high-quality, scalable, and maintainable solutions.
Collaborate closely with development team members and stakeholders.

What We're Looking For:
3 or more years of experience developing software in an Agile, team-based environment.
1 or more years of experience developing responsive web applications.
Expertise with Angular, ASP.NET Core, C#, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, SASS, and HTML.
BS and/or MS in a technical discipline, Computer Science or Software Engineering required.
Strong understanding of OOP concepts and design patterns.
Experience in building robust APIs and adhering to Service-Oriented Architecture principles.
Familiarity with event-based software design and event-driven architecture.
Experience with PostgreSQL or other relational databases, and Entity Framework Core or similar object-relational mapping frameworks.

purpose: A backend-heavy resume should not look strong for a frontend React role just because it has API and database work. Current rules do not yet distinguish building backend APIs from consuming APIs in a frontend, so this case keeps that as a known future improvement instead of forcing a false under-sold label.
resume_text:
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Python, SQL, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git

PROJECTS
Backend Analytics API
- Built a FastAPI service with PostgreSQL and Docker.
- Implemented API endpoints and maintained Git-based version control.
job_description:
Required Qualifications
Build responsive web applications using React, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, and CSS. Write automated testing for user interfaces and participate in code reviews.

Preferred Qualifications
Experience consuming REST APIs from frontend applications.
